place_mentions: Embalee de la Cuerda del Poso
pages.notes: This is an index page mapping entry numbers to place names with page numbers in a right-hand column (page numbers are partially cut off at the right edge of the scan). Entry 1 is annotated 'Spain 2008' giving the year. No entry 6 is visible (jumps from 5 to 7). 'Arpile' may be 'Arevalo' or similar Spanish place; written as 'Arpile'. 'Embalee de la Cuerda del Poso' is likely 'Embalse de la Cuerda del Pozo' (reservoir near Soria, Spain). 'Roncevallbs' likely 'Roncesvalles'. 'Bas Noux' uncertain — could be 'Bas Nouc' or a campsite name. 'St. Jean de Vauce' uncertain — could be 'St. Jean de Luz' or 'St. Jean de Vaux'. 'Hamperley' may be 'Hamperley' (a village near Church Stretton). 'Alnick Garden' likely 'Alnwick Garden'. 'Dunstanborough' likely 'Dunstanburgh'. Entries in black ink (1-13 approx) then blue ink (14 onwards), suggesting two writing sessions.

pages.notes: Continuation of the index from the left page. Entry 21 is repeated on both pages (Cragside/Rothbury/Kielder on left; Bowes/Arkengarthdale on right) — the right page likely refers to the same trip entry continuing. 'Halesfam' may be 'Halesworth' or 'Halesham'. 'Pentyrse' uncertain — could be 'Pentyrch' (Wales) or 'Pentre'. 'Torpatten' uncertain — possibly 'Torpantau' (Brecon Beacons area). 'Cwmiswyth' likely 'Cwmystwyth'. 'Thornmess' uncertain — possibly 'Thornness' (Isle of Wight) or a campsite name. 'Groenpark' likely a Dutch campsite. 'Donk' likely 'Donk' (Belgium). 'St. Amands' likely 'Sint-Amands' (Belgium). 'Elewist' possibly 'Elewijt' (Belgium). 'Mechelon Mahines' likely 'Mechelen/Malines' (Belgium). 'Lowersborg' uncertain — possibly 'Lauterburg' or similar. 'Osare' uncertain. 'St. Genest Malifoux' possibly 'St. Genest-Malifaux'. 'Vivier Monastrol d'Allier' likely 'Vivier / Monistrol d'Allier'. 'Giant's Causeway' appears unexpectedly in entry 36 alongside French locations — possibly a separate unrelated trip note. 'Entraques' likely 'Entraygues-sur-Truyère'. Entry 37 appears to be cut off at bottom of page.
